title: BookingIntent
description: End-of-conversation extracted intent payload. The 11-field core matches the 10-stage target architecture (Stage 5); the Picnic-specific extensions live in `x_picnic` so the core remains portable across tenants. Designed to be used as the structured-output schema for /api/ai/extract-booking-intent (not yet implemented — see REFACTOR_DIAGNOSIS.md §4.2).

conversation_id.description: FK to public.conversations.id. Required so the extraction can be audited and re-run.

channel.description: Origin channel. Echoed verbatim from conversations.channel.

intention.description: Top-level intent. The chatbot parser today emits a richer set (book|modify|cancel|waitlist|info|offtopic|confirm_yes|confirm_no|null); the extractor normalizes to these three terminal intents and emits null when the conversation ended without a fulfillable booking action.

booking_datetime.description: ISO-8601 timestamp WITH timezone. Today reservations.date (text YYYY-MM-DD) and reservations.time (text HH:MM) are stored separately; the extractor must combine them and apply the tenant timezone (settings.timezone, e.g. Atlantic/Canary for Picnic).

num_guests.description: Total party size requested. For CHANGE intents see x_picnic.delta_personas if the change is relative.

allergies.description: Structured allergens. The chatbot today merges allergies into `notas` (free text); the extractor must split them out into discrete tags so they can land in reservations.allergies (text[]).

customer_name.description: Customer name. Guard against hallucinated placeholders (e.g. 'Amigo', 'Cliente', 'Friend', 'Caller') — emit null instead.

customer_phone.description: E.164. Voice channels must validate against the Retell {{from_number}} placeholder hole (+34600000000) and prefer the value captured at conversation start.

service_type.description: Free-form service taxonomy. Picnic does not use this — leave null. See x_picnic.shift for the lunch/dinner indicator.

special_requests.description: Free-text bundle of non-allergy notes (booster seat, birthday cake, view, etc.). The current parser writes everything into `notas` plus side-detected items into `shadowNotes`; merge both here.

language.description: ISO-639-1 of the conversation language. Mirrors conversations.language and the parser's _sess.lang. Picnic supports the four listed locales.

x_picnic.description: Picnic-specific extensions. Kept in a namespaced sub-object so the core 11 fields stay portable.

zona.description: Seating zone preference. Maps to reservations.zona / reservation_tables.zone (interior=inside, exterior=outside).

delta_personas.description: Relative party-size change for CHANGE intents (e.g. '+2' for 'somos dos más'). When set, num_guests should reflect the resulting absolute total.

shift.description: Computed from booking_datetime against tenants.settings.opening_hours. Mirrors reservations.shift.

force_new.description: True when the customer explicitly opted to re-book after the bot flagged a duplicate within ±3 days.

edge_hour.description: True when the requested time is within 45 minutes of the closing time for that shift — flagged for manual review.

proposed_alternatives.description: Counter-offer history echoed from the parser when the original request was unavailable.
